summary: First-finish smoke tests for CodeLens after code-review fixes (SHA-256 signature, stable React keys, console.error logging). All 13 backend checks and all 5 frontend flows passed. Live watch mode verified end-to-end (backend + UI).
passed: POST /api/repos/local imports /app/backend; returns id, last_signature (SHA-256, 64 hex), last_synced_at
GET /models: 6 Pydantic models (Repo, Annotation, ImportLocalRequest, ImportGithubRequest, AnnotationCreate, WatchToggle), no duplicate (name,file,line) tuples
GET /dependencies: nodes=4, edges=3 (non-zero, import resolution working)
GET /components: returns 2 items on backend repo (works, empty JS/TS as expected)
POST /annotations creates, GET lists, DELETE removes (verified count went 1->0)
LIVE WATCH: created /tmp/wtest local repo, enabled watch, appended to main.py; after 7s last_synced_at changed (13:12:14 -> 13:12:17) and GET /file returned updated content
POST /refresh manually re-syncs, returns file_count=7 and new last_synced_at
DELETE /repos/{id} removes repo (404 after), storage dir deleted, annotations deleted
Frontend Import: 3 tabs (upload/local/github) visible; local path import navigates to /repo/<id>/overview
Overview: framework-FastAPI and framework-MongoDB visible; 7 sidebar nav items present
Endpoints view: 21 rows rendered; clicking a row navigates to /explorer with code-viewer visible
Live Watch UI: Refresh + Watch buttons in header; Watch -> 'Watching' (green) -> back to 'Watch' works; toast 'Watch mode ON/OFF' shown
Search: typing 'BaseModel' returns 7 results in dropdown; clicking a result opens models.py in code-viewer
notes: Minor: Sonner toast overlay briefly intercepts pointer events after watch toggle; a second immediate click may be blocked. Not a bug (UX toast, dismisses on its own or with force=True). No console errors observed. Test repos and /tmp/wtest cleaned up.
